changelog:
- Version 4.6-Fireflies
🎨 Typography & Visuals
 * Dynamic TTF Engine: On-the-fly path extraction with auto font scanner and UI picker.
 * Dual-Tone Rendering: Split paths (hours, colon, mins) for dual-tone color combos.
 * Smart Color Extraction: Instant wallpaper theming via 112px image downsampling.
 * Premium Loading Overlay: Frosted overlay with glowing particles masks ML calculations.
📐 Layout & Physics
 * Vertical Magazine Layout: New 2x2 grid layout with independent column collision.
 * Animated Morphing: Smooth horizontal/vertical interpolation with cached performance.
 * Notification Safe Zone: Auto-shrinks to a safe area when notifications appear.
🛡️ System & Stability
 * Xposed Asset Resolution: Fixes lockscreen font loading from host APK.
 * R8 Protection: ProGuard rules to prevent stripping of Xposed modules and layouts.
 * Serialization Safety: Prevents JSON parsing crashes with LiveWallpaperConfig.
